summary: Merged Customers 360 Page testing completed. All 16 backend tests pass. All frontend UI features verified working correctly. The new /api/admin/customers-360 endpoints provide aggregated customer data with order/invoice/quote counts and recent transactions. The merged CustomersPageMerged replaces the old separate Customers and Customer Accounts pages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customers 360 merge complete. /admin/customers now loads CustomersPageMerged with table+drawer pattern. Customer Accounts route removed. Backend uses /api/admin/customers-360 prefix to avoid conflicts with existing /api/admin/customers CRUD routes.

GET /api/admin/customers-360/list.details: Returns customer list with name, email, company, type, total_orders, active_invoices, status, last_activity_at. Supports search and status filters.

GET /api/admin/customers-360/{customer_i.details: Returns full 360 detail with summary (totals), recent_quotes, recent_invoices, recent_orders, profile, assigned_sales. Supports lookup by ID or email.

status_filter.details: status=active and status=inactive filtering works correctly

/admin/customers_page.details: Loads CustomersPageMerged with table showing all columns: Recent Activity, Customer, Email, Company, Type, Orders, Invoices, Sales, Status

customer_360_drawer.details: Clicking customer row opens DetailDrawer with Customer 360 content including KPI cards (Quotes, Invoices, Orders, Unpaid), Profile section, Sales Ownership section, and Recent Transactions (Quotes, Invoices, Orders)

sidebar_customer_accounts_removed.details: Sidebar no longer shows Customer Accounts link. Only 'Customers' under SALES section.

/admin/customer-accounts_route_removed.details: Route redirects to login page (route effectively removed from App.js)

/admin/payments_regression.details: PaymentsQueuePage loads correctly with all columns

/admin/orders_regression.details: OrdersPage loads correctly with tabs and all columns

/admin/quotes_regression.details: QuotesRequestsPage loads correctly with all columns
